arts.ttl: Shambolic Brazil shown up by bitter rivals Argentina
arts.sum: Outpassed, outfought and thoroughly outcoached. Brazil plunged to new lows in its humiliating 4-1 loss to bitter rival Argentina in a World Cup qualifier Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Argentina troll Brazil on the pitch as they win in historic fashion
arts.sum: Argentina delivered a sensational performance on home soil, defeating archrivals Brazil 4-1 in a CONMEBOL World Cup Qualifying match that made history. The win marked a historic milestone, as Argentina became the first team ever to score four goals against Brazil in the history of World Cup Qualifying.

arts.ttl: Brazil humiliated by Argentina as bitter rivals book place at 2026 World Cup
arts.sum: Alvarez, Fernández, Mac Allister and Simeone on target in 4-1 win Argentina the first South American team to secure qualification Brazil were humiliated 4-1 by bitter rivals Argentina in South American World Cup qualifiers as the pressure mounted on manager Dorival Júnior after his side were comprehensively outplayed and fortunate not to lose by more. After edging Colombia 2-1 at home on Thursday, Brazil came crashing back to earth against the world champions, who started the rout with a close-range strike by Julián Alvarez four minutes after kick-off. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Brazil humiliated by Argentina in 4-1 WCQ loss
arts.sum: Argentina celebrated their 2026 World Cup berth with a decisive 4-1 victory over Brazil in Tuesday's South American qualifier.

arts.ttl: Argentina 4-1 Brazil: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Fernandez, Mac Allister net in dominant win
arts.sum: Premier League stars Enzo Fernandez and Alexis Mac Allister help fire Argentina to a 4-1 victory over Brazil in World Cup qualifying.

arts.ttl: Champions Argentina qualify for 2026 World Cup
arts.sum: Argentina will get the chance to defend its World Cup title in 2026 after becoming the first South American team to qualify for the tournament in the United States, Canada and Mexico next year.

arts.ttl: Trinity Rodman is back with the US soccer team for a pair of games against Brazil
arts.sum: Rodman was part of the U.S. team’s “Triple Espresso” front line with Mallory Swanson and Sophia Wilson that helped lead the team to its fifth Olympic gold medal in Paris. She made her return to her club team, the Washington Spirit, last weekend in an National Women’s Soccer League match.

arts.ttl: Argentina vs Brazil: How to watch 2026 World Cup qualifier in the UK
arts.sum: Argentina and Brazil partake in the latest installment of their historic rivalry this week as they face off in a 2026 Fifa Men’s World Cup qualifier. The two nations are ranked number one and three respectively in the world, which is also where the two sides lie in the Conmebol standings. arts.sum: The two giants of South American football will go head-to-head in Buenos Aires
